british.mafia_open: Right then, Mafia. Open your eyes, yeah?
british.mafia_close: Mafia, close your eyes. Off you pop.
british.doctor_open: Doctor, open your eyes, if you please.
british.detective_open: Detective, open your eyes. Have a look, then.

australian.mafia_open: Oi, Mafia! Open your eyes, mate.
australian.mafia_close: Mafia, shut your eyes. Good on ya.
australian.doctor_close: Doctor, close your eyes. No worries.
australian.detective_open: Detective, open your eyes. Have a squiz.
australian.detective_close: Detective, close your eyes. She'll be right.

southern.mafia_open: Alright Mafia, y'all go on and open your eyes.
southern.mafia_close: Mafia, close your eyes now, darlin'.
southern.doctor_open: Doctor, open them eyes up, sugar.
southern.doctor_close: Doctor, close your eyes now, hear?
southern.detective_open: Detective, go ahead and open your eyes.
southern.detective_close: Detective, close your eyes, bless your heart.

italian.mafia_open: Mafia... aprite gli occhi. Open your eyes.
italian.mafia_close: Mafia, chiudete gli occhi. Close your eyes.

pirate.mafia_open: Arrr! Mafia, open yer eyes, ye scallywags!
pirate.mafia_close: Mafia, shut yer eyes! Back to the depths!
pirate.doctor_close: Surgeon, shut yer eyes! Rest now!
pirate.detective_close: Lookout, shut yer eyes! Back to yer post!

transylvanian.mafia_open: Mafia... open your eyes. The night... is yours.
transylvanian.mafia_close: Mafia... close your eyes. Sleep now.
transylvanian.doctor_open: Doctor... open your eyes. Who vill you save tonight?
transylvanian.doctor_close: Doctor... close your eyes. Your vork is done.
transylvanian.detective_open: Detective... open your eyes. Vhat do you see?
transylvanian.detective_close: Detective... close your eyes. The truth... can vait.

noir.mafia_open: The shadows stir. Mafia... open your eyes.
noir.mafia_close: Back into the darkness, Mafia. Close your eyes.
noir.doctor_open: The healer awakens. Doctor, open your eyes.
noir.doctor_close: Rest now, Doctor. Close your eyes.
noir.detective_open: The gumshoe stirs. Detective, open your eyes.
noir.detective_close: Enough snooping. Detective, close your eyes.
